testsuite.name: Класс Тестов на регистрацию нового пользователя

testcase.name: Заполнив все обязательные поля должно появиться модальное окно с заполнеными данными

testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - No webdriver is bound to current thread: 1 - let's create a new webdriver [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.FileHelper - Creating folder: C:\AQA\AQA-start\build\downloads\1780175902314_27392_1 мая 31, 2026 12:18:23 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 мая 31, 2026 12:18:23 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.168. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
